aRxiv v0.5.20
  • Get started
  • Reference

arXiv subject classifications

Source: R/arxiv_cats-data.R
arxiv_cats.Rd

arXiv subject classifications: their abbreviations and corresponding descriptions.

data(arxiv_cats)

Format

A data frame with two columns: the abbreviations of the subject classifications (abbreviation) and the corresponding description (description).

Source

http://arxiv.org/help/api/user-manual

Examples

arxiv_cats

#>           abbreviation
#> 1              stat.AP
#> 2              stat.CO
#> 3              stat.ML
#> 4              stat.ME
#> 5              stat.TH
#> 6             q-bio.BM
#> 7             q-bio.CB
#> 8             q-bio.GN
#> 9             q-bio.MN
#> 10            q-bio.NC
#> 11            q-bio.OT
#> 12            q-bio.PE
#> 13            q-bio.QM
#> 14            q-bio.SC
#> 15            q-bio.TO
#> 16               cs.AR
#> 17               cs.AI
#> 18               cs.CL
#> 19               cs.CC
#> 20               cs.CE
#> 21               cs.CG
#> 22               cs.GT
#> 23               cs.CV
#> 24               cs.CY
#> 25               cs.CR
#> 26               cs.DS
#> 27               cs.DB
#> 28               cs.DL
#> 29               cs.DM
#> 30               cs.DC
#> 31               cs.GL
#> 32               cs.GR
#> 33               cs.HC
#> 34               cs.IR
#> 35               cs.IT
#> 36               cs.LG
#> 37               cs.LO
#> 38               cs.MS
#> 39               cs.MA
#> 40               cs.MM
#> 41               cs.NI
#> 42               cs.NE
#> 43               cs.NA
#> 44               cs.OS
#> 45               cs.OH
#> 46               cs.PF
#> 47               cs.PL
#> 48               cs.RO
#> 49               cs.SE
#> 50               cs.SD
#> 51               cs.SC
#> 52             nlin.AO
#> 53             nlin.CG
#> 54             nlin.CD
#> 55             nlin.SI
#> 56             nlin.PS
#> 57             math.AG
#> 58             math.AT
#> 59             math.AP
#> 60             math.CT
#> 61             math.CA
#> 62             math.CO
#> 63             math.AC
#> 64             math.CV
#> 65             math.DG
#> 66             math.DS
#> 67             math.FA
#> 68             math.GM
#> 69             math.GN
#> 70             math.GT
#> 71             math.GR
#> 72             math.HO
#> 73             math.IT
#> 74             math.KT
#> 75             math.LO
#> 76             math.MP
#> 77             math.MG
#> 78             math.NT
#> 79             math.NA
#> 80             math.OA
#> 81             math.OC
#> 82             math.PR
#> 83             math.QA
#> 84             math.RT
#> 85             math.RA
#> 86             math.SP
#> 87             math.ST
#> 88             math.SG
#> 89            astro-ph
#> 90     cond-mat.dis-nn
#> 91   cond-mat.mes-hall
#> 92   cond-mat.mtrl-sci
#> 93      cond-mat.other
#> 94       cond-mat.soft
#> 95  cond-mat.stat-mech
#> 96     cond-mat.str-el
#> 97   cond-mat.supr-con
#> 98               gr-qc
#> 99              hep-ex
#> 100            hep-lat
#> 101             hep-ph
#> 102             hep-th
#> 103            math-ph
#> 104            nucl-ex
#> 105            nucl-th
#> 106     physics.acc-ph
#> 107      physics.ao-ph
#> 108    physics.atom-ph
#> 109   physics.atm-clus
#> 110     physics.bio-ph
#> 111    physics.chem-ph
#> 112   physics.class-ph
#> 113    physics.comp-ph
#> 114    physics.data-an
#> 115    physics.flu-dyn
#> 116     physics.gen-ph
#> 117     physics.geo-ph
#> 118    physics.hist-ph
#> 119    physics.ins-det
#> 120     physics.med-ph
#> 121     physics.optics
#> 122      physics.ed-ph
#> 123     physics.soc-ph
#> 124   physics.plasm-ph
#> 125     physics.pop-ph
#> 126   physics.space-ph
#> 127           quant-ph
#>                                                            description
#> 1                                            Statistics - Applications
#> 2                                             Statistics - Computation
#> 3                                        Statistics - Machine Learning
#> 4                                             Statistics - Methodology
#> 5                                                  Statistics - Theory
#> 6                                  Quantitative Biology - Biomolecules
#> 7                                 Quantitative Biology - Cell Behavior
#> 8                                      Quantitative Biology - Genomics
#> 9                            Quantitative Biology - Molecular Networks
#> 10                        Quantitative Biology - Neurons and Cognition
#> 11                                        Quantitative Biology - Other
#> 12                    Quantitative Biology - Populations and Evolution
#> 13                         Quantitative Biology - Quantitative Methods
#> 14                        Quantitative Biology - Subcellular Processes
#> 15                           Quantitative Biology - Tissues and Organs
#> 16                                     Computer Science - Architecture
#> 17                          Computer Science - Artificial Intelligence
#> 18                         Computer Science - Computation and Language
#> 19                         Computer Science - Computational Complexity
#> 20  Computer Science - Computational Engineering; Finance; and Science
#> 21                           Computer Science - Computational Geometry
#> 22                 Computer Science - Computer Science and Game Theory
#> 23          Computer Science - Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
#> 24                            Computer Science - Computers and Society
#> 25                        Computer Science - Cryptography and Security
#> 26                   Computer Science - Data Structures and Algorithms
#> 27                                        Computer Science - Databases
#> 28                                Computer Science - Digital Libraries
#> 29                             Computer Science - Discrete Mathematics
#> 30     Computer Science - Distributed; Parallel; and Cluster Computing
#> 31                               Computer Science - General Literature
#> 32                                         Computer Science - Graphics
#> 33                       Computer Science - Human-Computer Interaction
#> 34                            Computer Science - Information Retrieval
#> 35                               Computer Science - Information Theory
#> 36                                         Computer Science - Learning
#> 37                        Computer Science - Logic in Computer Science
#> 38                            Computer Science - Mathematical Software
#> 39                               Computer Science - Multiagent Systems
#> 40                                       Computer Science - Multimedia
#> 41             Computer Science - Networking and Internet Architecture
#> 42                Computer Science - Neural and Evolutionary Computing
#> 43                               Computer Science - Numerical Analysis
#> 44                                Computer Science - Operating Systems
#> 45                                            Computer Science - Other
#> 46                                      Computer Science - Performance
#> 47                            Computer Science - Programming Languages
#> 48                                         Computer Science - Robotics
#> 49                             Computer Science - Software Engineering
#> 50                                            Computer Science - Sound
#> 51                             Computer Science - Symbolic Computation
#> 52         Nonlinear Sciences - Adaptation and Self-Organizing Systems
#> 53            Nonlinear Sciences - Cellular Automata and Lattice Gases
#> 54                               Nonlinear Sciences - Chaotic Dynamics
#> 55        Nonlinear Sciences - Exactly Solvable and Integrable Systems
#> 56                 Nonlinear Sciences - Pattern Formation and Solitons
#> 57                                    Mathematics - Algebraic Geometry
#> 58                                    Mathematics - Algebraic Topology
#> 59                                      Mathematics - Analysis of PDEs
#> 60                                       Mathematics - Category Theory
#> 61                           Mathematics - Classical Analysis and ODEs
#> 62                                         Mathematics - Combinatorics
#> 63                                   Mathematics - Commutative Algebra
#> 64                                     Mathematics - Complex Variables
#> 65                                 Mathematics - Differential Geometry
#> 66                                     Mathematics - Dynamical Systems
#> 67                                   Mathematics - Functional Analysis
#> 68                                   Mathematics - General Mathematics
#> 69                                      Mathematics - General Topology
#> 70                                    Mathematics - Geometric Topology
#> 71                                          Mathematics - Group Theory
#> 72                                  Mathematics - History and Overview
#> 73                                    Mathematics - Information Theory
#> 74                                 Mathematics - K-Theory and Homology
#> 75                                                 Mathematics - Logic
#> 76                                  Mathematics - Mathematical Physics
#> 77                                       Mathematics - Metric Geometry
#> 78                                         Mathematics - Number Theory

#> 80                                     Mathematics - Operator Algebras

#> 82                                           Mathematics - Probability

#> 86                                       Mathematics - Spectral Theory
#> 87                                            Mathematics - Statistics
#> 88                                   Mathematics - Symplectic Geometry
#> 89                                                        Astrophysics
#> 90                    Physics - Disordered Systems and Neural Networks
#> 91                Physics - Mesoscopic Systems and Quantum Hall Effect
#> 92                                         Physics - Materials Science
#> 93                                                     Physics - Other
#> 94                                     Physics - Soft Condensed Matter
#> 95                                     Physics - Statistical Mechanics
#> 96                             Physics - Strongly Correlated Electrons
#> 97                                         Physics - Superconductivity
#> 98                            General Relativity and Quantum Cosmology
#> 99                                    High Energy Physics - Experiment
#> 100                                      High Energy Physics - Lattice
#> 101                                High Energy Physics - Phenomenology

#> 104                                                 Nuclear Experiment
#> 105                                                     Nuclear Theory
